# MuckAway (muckaway.ai)

> Instant muckaway quotes. Zero phone calls.

Enter your spoil type, access and volume. We match you to the nearest licensed tipper or grab lorry — and quote in seconds.

## What this is
MuckAway is a vertical in the CSOAI Hive — EU AI Act / NIS2 / DORA compliant tooling exposed as Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers callable by any AI agent.

## MCP tools
- muckaway-ai-mcp.quote_job: Embed instant muckaway quotes in CRMs, spreadsheets or AI agents.

## Discovery
- Agent card: https://muckaway.ai/agent.json
- MCP catalog: https://muckaway.ai/.well-known/mcp.json
- Sitemap: https://muckaway.ai/sitemap.xml
- Hive registry: https://csoai.org (271 published MCP servers)

## Pricing
See https://muckaway.ai/pricing/
